title: Has Bash but only runs git diff — no linting or pattern checks
why_it_matters: Agent has Bash tool but only uses it for 'git diff'. Should run npm run patterns:check, eslint, prettier for automated pre-review.
suggested_fix: Add script workflow: git diff → eslint --fix → patterns:check → then behavioral review.
